metadata.defaultDescription: Premium apparel commerce powered by Northlane Apparel product stories and a resilient event-driven checkout.
metadata.productsDescription: Shop apparel by category, size, color, brand and price.

navigation.shopPanelTitle: Move through the catalog with context.
navigation.shopPanelSummary: Enter the catalog through the full directory or take a narrower route into the current edit.
navigation.ordersSignedInSummary: Your account keeps orders, addresses and profile details in one place.
navigation.ordersGuestSummary: Order history and account tools become available after sign-in.
navigation.categoriesTitle: Browse categories without guessing the route.
navigation.categoriesSummary: Category navigation reflects the catalog structure coming from the backend, including subcategories when they exist.
navigation.categoriesLoading: Categories are loading from the catalog.

links.allProducts: The full product directory with filters, sorting and pagination.
links.newArrivals: A tighter product edit focused on the latest pieces in the catalog.
links.winterEdit: The current winter selection across tailoring, outerwear and knits.
links.tailoring: Formal layers and softer structure for daily tailored outfits.
links.signInOrders: Sign in to view your order timeline, delivery progress and past purchases.
links.savedAddresses: Review saved addresses and account details before your next checkout.
links.orderHistory: See every order, its current status and the items you already purchased.
links.profileDetails: Update profile details that support future checkouts and delivery notices.
links.deliveryAddresses: Review your shipping addresses before starting a new checkout.

footer.headline: Apparel for long routes, precise cuts and checkout flows that hold.

marquee: Store pickup at no extra cost

sweaters.title: Sharper layers for long winter lines.
sweaters.description: Sweaters, structured knits and darker textures built for cold days without losing shape.

tailoring.title: Formal cuts without the old uniform feel.
tailoring.description: Suits, jackets and dress trousers with cleaner lines for office, events and daily use.

outerwear.title: Soft volume, exact texture, darker tone.
outerwear.description: Coats and puffers with useful warmth, precise lengths and easy styling.

jackets.title: Urban jackets tuned for movement and weight.
jackets.description: Technical layers and denim jackets designed to keep the silhouette sharp.

featured.title: Current pieces with enough structure for daily wear.
featured.empty: Featured products will appear when the catalog is available.

tailoring.title: Precision cuts with less ceremony.
tailoring.description: Suits, soft jackets and formal trousers shaped for daily use. The collection stays formal where it matters and lighter everywhere else.

cards.stockDescription: Every selected size is guarded through the flow before payment closes.
cards.seasonDescription: Outerwear, knitwear and tailoring are staged as a coherent winter edit.
cards.accountDescription: Orders, addresses and profile details stay organized without extra steps.

products.emptyDescription: Change size, color or price filters to widen the collection.

auth.duplicateEmail: An account with that email already exists. Sign in or use another email.
auth.genericError: Authentication failed. Check the form and retry.

account.signInDescription: Your bag, addresses and order timeline stay behind the account boundary.

cart.title: Your bag
cart.emptyDescription: Add a product to begin checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.emptyDescription: Checkout starts from the active bag snapshot.

success.title: We are confirming your order.
success.description: Mercado Pago approved the payment. The order status below is read from Northlane, so it may take a few seconds to show confirmed.

failure.title: The payment could not be completed.
failure.description: The order will stay protected until the payment result is processed. If it was rejected, reserved stock is released automatically.

pending.title: The provider is still reviewing the payment.
pending.description: Do not create a duplicate order. We will update the order once Mercado Pago sends the final status.

paymentReturn.missingOrder: The payment return did not include an order reference.

admin.signInDescription: Management APIs require an active admin session and the gateway enforces the admin guard.
admin.forbiddenTitle: Your account does not have admin access.
admin.forbiddenDescription: This workspace is reserved for catalog, stock and order operations.

errors.requestFailed: The request could not be completed.
